sentences.arabic: عَادَ آلَافُ الطُّلَّابِ إِلَى مَدَارِسِهِمْ فِي بِدَايَةِ الْعَامِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Hiljade učenika vratilo se u svoje škole na početku školske godine.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of students returned to their schools at the beginning of the school year.

sentences.arabic: جَهَّزَتِ الْوَزَارَةُ الْكُتُبَ وَالْفُصُولَ لِاسْتِقْبَالِ التَّلَامِيذِ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo je pripremilo knjige i učionice za prijem đaka.
sentences.translationEn: The ministry prepared books and classrooms to receive the pupils.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الْأَطْفَالُ بِالْفَرَحِ لِرُؤْيَةِ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Djeca osjećaju radost što ponovo vide svoje prijatelje.
sentences.translationEn: Children feel joy to see their friends again.

sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الْمَدَارِسُ بِتَقْدِيمِ تَعْلِيمٍ عَالِي الْجَوْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škole su zainteresovane za pružanje visokokvalitetnog obrazovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Schools are interested in providing high-quality education.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ التَّعْلِيمُ الرَّكِيزَةَ الْأَسَاسِيَّةَ لِبِنَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Obrazovanje se smatra osnovnim stubom izgradnje društva.
sentences.translationEn: Education is the basic pillar for building society.
